codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly updates all route middleware permissions as specified. All 14 validation assertions (VAL-BACKEND-001 through VAL-BACKEND-014) are satisfied. The changes are minimal and focused, affecting only the RequireRoles middleware calls in main.go.

summary: PASS - All RBAC permission changes implemented correctly. Admin role removed from books, copies, reports, and fines pay endpoints. Librarian role added to reports. DELETE /books/:id and POST /fines/:id/waive are now super_admin only. Build and tests pass. Worker followed the skill procedure correctly.
